title: Uniting the Crypto world
subtitle-1: We’re proud to announce the launch of the
subtitle-2: —  the first platform that will unite all blockchain networks and market participants.
how: How can YOU benefit from the OTN?
white-text: If you want to start taking advantage of the Open Trading Network, you can
white-strong: mine OTN tokens by trading cryptocurrencies
white-text-2: on the IQ Option platform*. The more you trade - the more tokens you get!
white-small: You can either hold on to the tokens and watch their value multiply or use them to compensate a portion of your trading commission.
dash: *Token-based rewards will be calculated at the end of each trading week and credited to a trading account each Monday starting October 16th, 2017. Emissions are proportional to the size of trading commission endured by the trader. Terms and Conditions apply.
